Данный продукт представляет из себя плагин для системы Docsvision - системы для автоматизации документооборота и бизнес-процессов организации, занимающей лидирующие позиции на рынке Российской Федерации и стран СНГ.
Плагин позволяет осуществлять запуск приложения Docsvision Windows-клиент (рабочее место пользователя Docsvision) по ссылке при использовании Chrome в качестве браузера по умолчанию. Плагин позволит используя URL адрес, получаемый пользователем по электронной почте, или иным способом, открывать документы и задания из системы.

Плагин совместим с Docsvision версий 5.3, 5.4, 5.5 и 6.1

TRAVIC-Sign is designed for financial institutions and computer centres that want to use strong security processes to offer their web application customers more protection from misuse and data manipulation. The strong security is based on the use of a smartcard reader or a security token at client pc which is connected with a web-application by TRAVIC-Sign. 

Digital signatures applied by the smartcard reader protect order data – e.g. payments, inventory changes or product sales – by means of an advanced signature that is linked to a person. Signed data can be assigned reliably to a specific person by the bank. Additionally the bank itself is able to sign the order date which can be checked by TRAVIC-Sign. By verifying the signature combined with the hardened smartcard reader attackers are not able to manipulate the communication.

The TRAVIC-Sign extension available for download here is one part of the TRAVIC-Sign product. The second part is the installer which enables the browser to communicate with the smartcard reader. In order to work properly TRAVIC-Sign must be integrated in an existing web-application. The screenshots in the overview illustrate the portal TRAVIC-Port that uses TRAVIC-Sign for signing orders. You get more information in the product flyer linked here http://www.ppi.de/fileadmin/user_upload/Software-Produkte/Publikationen/en/PPI_TRAVIC-Sign_en.pdf

保护用户输入信息的安全性，用户需要安装 CFCA 提供的应用程序，应用程序获取到用户输入的密码数据，将数据经过程序内置的公钥进行加密，然后传输给扩展程序。实现对用户输入密码的安全性保护。

Podepisovací komponenta Signer používaná v Portálu ZP (www.portalzp.cz) pro sestavení digitálního podpisu pomocí klientského certifikátu.
Tato komponenta umožňuje použití klientských certifikátů ve webovém prohlížeči a umožňuje využívat i certifikáty na kartách, které jsou dostupné pomocí Windows CryptoAPI.

Pro správný běh komponenty je potřeba doinstalovat i její druhou část, tzv. nativní aplikaci, která zajišťuje prohlížeči přístup k Vašim certifikátům.
Tato část se instaluje automaticky, pokud jste spustili aplikaci "Instalace Portálu ZP" z webové stránky https://www.portalzp.cz/ke-stazeni nebo ve formě samostatné instalace (pouhá nativní aplikace komponenty) z odkazu https://www.portalzp.cz/download/NMSignerInstall.exe

Samotná komponenta při zjištění, že není nainstalována nativní aplikace, na tuto skutečnost upozorní a nabídne odkaz na její stažení.

Komponenta je určena pouze pro systémy Microsoft Windows.
TNB Teknoloji KEP(.hs02) için gerekli imza eklentisi

TNB Teknoloji e-imza eklentisi ile, sağladığımız Kayıtlı Elektronik Posta (KEP) hizmetine giriş yaparken ve ileti gönderirken kolay bir şekilde e-imza ile imzalama yapmanızı sağlar.

TNB Teknoloji e-imza eklentisi, bilgisayarınızda kurulu Java uygulamamız ile iletişime geçerek çalışır.

TNB Teknoloji, Bilgi Teknolojileri ve İletişim Kurumu (BTK) Tarafından KEP hizmeti vermek üzere lisanslandırılan ilk özel kuruluştur. Kuruluşumuzdan beri sürdürmekte olduğumuz Kayıtlı Elektronik Posta (KEP) ve e-İmza hizmetlerinin yanı sıra özgün bilişim ürünlerimiz ve iş ortaklarımızın çözümleri ile tüm kurum ve kuruluşlarına güvenilir, sürdürülebilir ve üstün kalitede hizmet sunmaktayız.

TNB Teknoloji Kayıtlı Elektronik Posta (KEP) adresi: https://kep.hs02.kep.tr/

MERKEZ
Söğütözü Mah. Söğütözü Cad. No : 4 Çankaya/ANKARA/TR
T : +90 312 218 81 00 - F : +90 312 218 81 09,



With the TNB Technology e-signature add-on, you can easily sign in or send messages using an e-Signature on the Registered Electronic Mail (REM) service we provide.

TNB Technology e-signature plug-in works by communicating with our Java based application installed on your computer.

TNB Technology is the first private organization licensed by the Information and Communication Technologies Authority (ICTA) to provide REM services. In addition to the Registered Electronic Mail (REM) and e-Signature services that we have been providing since our establishment, we offer reliable, sustainable and superior quality services to all institutions and organizations with our unique IT products and the solutions of our business partners.

Open current tabs, links, pages (or all of them) in firefox

* Open a tab or all tabs in Firefox
* Open selection/link/pic/video/audio etc.
* Keyboard shortcuts
Windows: 
   1. Just install the host program (no need to install python).
            https://openinfirefox.wixsite.com/openinfirefox
            or
            https://www.mediafire.com/?1d8z99lx6o7cafb

   2. Open options menu and make sure your the Firefox path is correct.
OSX / Linux: 
   1. Install Python 2.7 - https://www.python.org/ftp/python/2.7.12/python-2.7.12.msi
   2. Download and run the install host script (Go to the add on page).
   3. Open options menu and make sure your the Firefox path is correct.
Automatically send links to the Opera browser from left or right-click without cluttering your Clipboard.

By using an open-source native client, this extension transfers links between your browse and Opera browser. The extension can configure to capture left-click over links and send configured hostnames to the Opera browser. This extension also provides a right-click context menu item to send links to the Opera browser without the need to copy the link to the system's clipboard first. Note that for this extension to send links, you need to install a small NodeJS-based native client. Without this native integration, the extension is not working. At this moment, the native-client only supports Windows, Linux, and Mac operating systems.

Features:
Send the current page to the Opera browser.
Send all tabs to the Opera browser.
Close a tab when the link is sent to the Opera browser.
Send tabs in the current window to the Opera browser.
Open Opera browser if no instance is present.
Add a new tab to the Opera browser if an instance is detected.
Support managed storage to configure the extension by a domain administrator instead of directly configuring each extension on a network.


--- Legal
Opera is a trademark of Opera Inc., registered in the U.S. and other countries. This extension is an independent project and has no relationship to the Opera team or Opera Inc.

Nextsense PDF Signing Component is web based component that supports PDF document digital signing, signature verification and document encryption. This product is developed to enable browser signing of documents with user’s local digital certificates and it is supported by leading web browsers. 

Nextsense PDF Signing Component offers the following advantages:
  -Simple digital signing of documents from a web browser with user’s local digital certificates, which provides proof of the signer’s identity and document integrity
  -Enables detection and verification of existing digital signatures on PDF files
  -Provides possibility for document encryption with user’s public key, enabling document personalization and protection
  -Fully compliant with laws and regulations in the country and EU 
  -Meets global technical standards for digital signing 
  -Easy integration of signing component into existing web applications 
  -Easy configuration of the component to set up trusted issuers, or list of approved signers, or uniquely allowed certificate

Digital signature extension for Costa Rica official certificates

Extensión que le permite utilizar su certificado digital de la CA SINPE (Costa Rica)  para firmar digitalmente documentos y transacciones directamente en la página web.  Funciona en conjunto con una aplicación nativa que se instala por aparte. Debido a esto la extensión requiere el permiso “nativeMessaging” para poder comunicarse con la aplicación nativa.

Extension that allows you to digitally sign transactions and documents inside a web page using your CA SINPE (Costa Rica) issued certificate. This extension works along with a native application that is installed separately. Therefore this extensions requires “nativeMessaging” permission in order to exchange information with the native application.

Privacidad y seguridad:

Esta extensión solo se puede usar desde app.firma-digital.cr y otros sitios web previamente autorizados. Esta extensión accede su certificado digital del SINPE y genera una firma digital usando la llave privada asociada al certificado.  Las firmas digitales de las transacciones y su respectivo certificado SINPE serán almacenados en la bitácora de app.firma-digital.cr o en la bitácora de los sitios web previamente autorizados.

La extensión siempre pedirá su autorización, mediante la solicitud del PIN, antes de generar una firma digital. Ni la extensión ni la empresa almacenan, transmiten o comparten el PIN o la llave privada de su certificado SINPE.  Las firmas digitales de las transacciones y sus respectivos certificados se guardan en una base de datos del sistema y solo se utilizan para probar la autenticidad e integridad de las transacciones y documentos firmados digitalmente. Esas firmas digitales o sus certificados o cualquier otra información de usuario nunca serán compartidos con terceros ni utilizados para otros propósitos que los indicados, excepto para satisfacer un requisito legal.

Privacy and Security:

This extension is allowed to be used only from app.firma-digital.cr and other sites previously authorized. This extension accesses your SINPE´s issued certificate in order to generate a digital signature. Digital signatures and their associated certificate will be stored in app.firma-digital.cr´s database or authorized sites databases.

This extension always asks for authorization, via PIN request, in order to generate a digital signature. Neither the extension nor Hermes Soluciones de Internet will transmit, store or share your SINPE issued certificate´s PIN or associated private key.

Digital signatures and their associated certificates are stored in the authorized site´s database and they are only used to probe authenticity and integrity of transactions and documents. Neither digital signatures nor certificates nor any other information collected from the user will ever be shared with third parties or will ever be used for other purposes than those stated above, but when required by law.

50 metros al sur primer entrada a Los Yoses
San Pedro, San José 11501
Costa Rica
Send the current page's link or all open tabs to the Microsoft Edge browser, or set optional rules for opening with a left-click.

You can send HTML links to Microsoft's Edge browser with a single click. The extension includes a browser action button that, when activated, sends the URL from the active tab to the Edge browser. Optionally, you can instruct the extension to close the tab once the URL transfer is complete. It's important to note that, like similar extensions, this one requires a native component (macOS, Windows, and Linux) for communication with the external browser.

Additionally, the extension enhances your productivity by adding a context menu option for links, allowing you to send them to the Edge browser with a simple right-click. To configure the extension to your needs, head to the options page and specify which hostnames should open in the Edge browser.

Since the extension use a native component, it can initiate a new instance if it detects no open Edge windows. This component has a built-in tool to help you locate the Edge executable.

The extension provides several context menu items within the browser action button, enabling you to send all tabs within the current window or  across all windows to the Edge browser. Also, it has two context menu items for link and text selection. It will extract links from selection area and open links in the Edge browser.

--- Legal Disclaimer
Please be aware that 'Edge' is a registered trademark of Microsoft Inc. in the United States and other countries. This extension is an independent project and is not affiliated with the Edge team or Microsoft Inc. in any way.
An extension used to create a detailed rich presence for YouTube videos on Discord.

Show your friends and others what you're watching on YouTube and YouTube Music!

In order for YouTubeDiscordPresence to work, a second desktop application needs to be installed on your computer based on the GitHub instructions: https://github.com/XFG16/YouTubeDiscordPresence/tree/main#installation

**The current version only supports the 64-bit version of Windows. YouTubeDiscordPresence does not support the browser version of Discord. Expect compatibility for other operating systems in the future.**

YouTubeDiscordPresence works similar to the Spotify rich presence on Discord—it only appears when a video is playing and disappears when there is no video or the video is paused. Idling and searching are not displayed.

Maximize your experience with YouTubeDiscordPresence by customizing your settings! To the settings page, click on the small YTDP icon on the top right of the browser under the extensions (puzzle piece) icon.
Enables device integration in compatible web applications for Jabra devices such as headsets or speakerphones.

Device integration allows you to operate a web application via hardware button presses on your device. Common web applications are for example browser-based UC Clients. 

Web application requirements:
★ integrated with "Jabra SDK Library for JavaScript"

Web client requirements:
★ installed "Jabra Device Connector" on operating system (Windows/macOS/Linux)
★ installed browser Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge
★ installed browser extension "Jabra Device Connector (Browser Extension)"

Download of "Jabra Device Connector": 
★ developer.jabra.com/site/global/sdk/javascript
This extension enables users to make one or more digital signatures of one or more documents in pdf, xml or binary format.

The add-on enables users to digitally sing one or more document in pdf, xml or binary format sent to them by the server, using an interface implemented in modern technologies such as HTML5, JS and CSS3.

It can be signed using files in PKCS12 format indicating the file and the password or using tokens by entering only the password (as indicated by the server), which can be considered as Advanced Electronic Signature, which "shall have the same validity and effectiveness as the autograph signature in public documents or private documents with certified signatures" in certain countries.

This add-on will be used in the administrative systems of Uruguay's public agencies implemented by GeneXus Consulting and in private agencies that wish to use it.

UY

This extension is used to launch the Taxport Powerview application from Chromium based web browsers. The extension passes the user from the browser to a native application already installed on their Windows based PC and then launches the Taxport Powerview application.

PEXA provides a simple and secure way to electronically sign documents and financial settlement when using your Chrome browser. 

Your Security is important. Digital Certificates use public key cryptographic technology to secure information that passes from one computer to another over a network.
This technology helps to ensure that transacting online is a secure method of information exchange.

Install the PEXA digital signing extension today and eliminate the costs, hassle, and lack of security in paper-based world.

For more information on how we handle your personal information, please refer to PEXA's privacy policy at https://www.pexa.com.au/privacy-policy
The extension launches ATLANTIS 3D Editor 2.0+ as a standalone application from Chrome ver 45+

For our Chrome browser users, this extension allows you to open your orders from atlantisweborder.com or orderdigitalsolutions.com with ATLANTIS 3D Editor version 2.0 and newer as standalone application from Chrome version 45 and newer that no longer support plugin.
Works only with Platina by Formpipe product. Enables opening documents for editing directly from the Platina document server.

This browser extension allows Platina by Formpipe users open or edit documents that are stored in Platina directly from the web browser without necessity to install legacy Platina Client Framework application.
Securely encode, manage, and utilize a hardware Multi-Factor Authentication device in a web browser.

Securely expand your enterprise identity verification and hardware Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) device distribution processes to the web with the PivIT Browser extension. 

PivIT makes It possible to interact with hardware devices such as fingerprint scanners, document capture devices, and hardware MFA devices through a web browser. With PivIT, organizations can make it more convenient to integrate high assurance identity verification and credentialing procedures through a simplified web-based experience. Furthermore, PivIT enables hardware MFA devices to be used for signing, encrypting, and advanced authentication to enforce the highest levels of security even when using a web browser.

44927 George Washington Blvd.

Ashburn, VA 20147

Capture the displayed web page and send the captured image to the Windows application Screenpresso for edition.

Well designed image and video screen capture. A screenshot is worth a thousand words!

This extension captures the displayed web page and sends the captured image to the Windows application "Screenpresso" for edition if available; otherwise, it will prompt to save the image file.

Screenpresso on Windows captures your desktop (screenshots and HD videos) for your training documents, collaborative design work, IT bug reports, and more. Screenpresso has a built-in image editor, user guide generator, and sharing options.

We are passionate developers, hope you will enjoy the Screenpresso experience.

Toulouse 31200
France
Proširenje za komunikaciju s HZZO aplikacijom za digitalno potpisivanje kako bi ono bilo moguće iz Internetskog preglednika.

Proširenje je namijenjeno komunikaciji s aplikacijom za digitalno potpisivanje kako bi digitalno potpisivanje bilo jednostavno dostupno iz Internetskog preglednika. Primjenom proširenja se omogućava digitalno potpisivanje propisanih elektroničkih obrazaca.
